assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 extracts the Upstream Affected Component (axios) from customfield_10632 and uses it to search for related CVE Jiras (§1.59)
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md line 9 shows 'Upstream Affected Component (customfield_10632) | Yes | axios' in the prerequisites table. Lines 17-19 show the JQL query using this field: 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND cf[10632] ~ "axios" AND key != TC-8010'. The search returns TC-8008 as a related CVE Jira.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 filters search results by matching PS Component (customfield_10669 = pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui) and Stream (customfield_10832 = rhtpa-2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 30-35 explicitly state: 'TC-8008 matches on all three dimensions: Upstream Affected Component: axios (matches TC-8010), PS Component: pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui (matches TC-8010), Stream: rhtpa-2.2 (matches TC-8010). TC-8008 passes the filter -- proceeding to remediation coverage check.'

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 traverses issuelinks on TC-8008 to find remediation task TC-8009 via the 'Depend' link type
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 38-40 under 'Issue Link Traversal' section: 'TC-8008 issue links: **Depend** link to TC-8009 (remediation Task)'. The traversal then proceeds to examine TC-8009 details.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 compares the remediation task's bump version (1.9.0) against the current CVE's fix threshold (1.8.2) and determines the fix is already covered
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 54-58 show the explicit comparison: 'Current CVE (TC-8010) fix threshold | 1.8.2', 'Existing remediation (TC-8009) bump version | 1.9.0', '1.9.0 >= 1.8.2? | YES'. Line 60 concludes: 'Result: The existing remediation task TC-8009 already covers this CVE.'

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing the issue because existing remediation task TC-8009 already bumps axios past the fix threshold — no new remediation task is created
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md line 3: 'Decision: Close -- Already Covered by Existing Remediation'. Line 5: 'TC-8010 does not require a new remediation task.' Lines 14-16 confirm the version comparison (1.9.0 >= 1.8.2 = YES -- covered). Lines 44-47 specify closing TC-8010. Line 78 of overlap-check.md: 'Recommendation: Close TC-8010 -- the fix is already covered by TC-8009.' No new remediation task is created.
